Asset Finance Facility

The Asset Finance Facility helps established SMEs acquire machinery, plant, and equipment in City of Cape Town and eThekwini.

Eligibility

  • Established businesses with at least 3 years of trading history.
  • Management accounts and tax clearance are required.

Funding Offer

Finance is available up to R10 million.

Repayment term can extend to 5 years.

Collateral required for larger exposures.

Application Process

Submit by email to deals@growthfinance.example.org with your supporting documents.
